title: Petitgas, Franck - Special Adviser to the Prime Minister on Business and Investment - ACOBA advice
body: "Lord Petitgas left his role at No. 10 in May 2024.  Consultant, Quantexa  Lord Petitgas sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Quantexa. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in May 2025 and the appointment was announced in July 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
